    Zhichao Huang

    Algorithm Engineer at JD.com, Inc. Focusing on KGs, LLMs and AI Agent.

    • Beijing, China
    • Email
    • ResearchGate
    • DBLP
    • Google Scholar

    😀 About Me

    I am now an algorithm engineer at JD.com, Inc. Before that, I participated in a half-a-year-long rotation training in the same company as a Doctor Management Trainee (DMT).

    I received my Ph.D. from Harbin Institute of Technology, Shenzhen in 2021 under the supervision of Prof. Yunming Ye. My research areas are knowledge graphs, LLMs and AI Agent, mainly focus on intent recognition, question answering and knowledge reasoning.

    For detailed papers, please refer to my publications.

    I am always open to collaborating with remote students and researchers who are interested in knowledge graphs, LLMs and AI Agent, etc. Please feel free to contact me. zhichao [at] cshzc [dot] top

    New!! We’re looking for talented full-time employees and interns to join our team working on training Vision-Language Models and applying it to AI Agent. If you are interested, please feel free to contact me.

    🔥 News

    • 2026.03, 🎉 1$\times$ paper was accepted to IJCNN'2026, congratulations to Chunyang and Xubo

    • 2026.02, 🎉 I was elected as an external technical expert for the Shandong Science and Technology Project

    • 2026.01, 🎉 1$\times$ paper was accepted to WWW'2026, congratulations to Jinjin

    • 2026.01, 🎉 1$\times$ paper was accepted to ACM TIST, congratulations to Professor Gan

    • 2025.11, 🎉 1$\times$ paper was accepted to AAAI'2026 and selected as an oral presentation paper

    • 2025.09, 🎉 I was elected as a CCF Senior Member

    • 2025.04, 🎉 1$\times$ paper was accepted to ICIC'2025, congratulations to Chunyang and Yanping

    • 2025.02, 🎉 I was supported by Beijing Natural Science Foundation

    • 2024.12, 🎉 1$\times$ paper was accepted to AAAI'2025 and selected as an oral presentation paper, congratulations to Bowen and Guangning

    • 2024.08, 🎉 1$\times$ paper was acceptd to Applied Intelligence Journal

    • 2024.07, 🎉 I was elected as a technical expert for the Beijing Science and Technology Project

    • 2023.12, 🎉 Awarded the "Yi Qilin" Excellent Talent designation by the Beijing Economic-Technological Development Area

    • 2023.12, 🎉 I was an associate senior researcher at the Beijing Natural Science Research Series Committee

    • 2023.02, 🎉 2$\times$ corresponding author papers were accepted to ICASSP'2023
